record_types.name: CR_Register

fields.name: SPDIFRXEN
fields.description: Receiver DMA ENable for data flow

fields.name: VMSK
fields.description: Mask of channel status and user bits

fields.name: PTMSK
fields.description: Control Buffer DMA ENable for control flow

fields.name: CHSEL
fields.description: Maximum allowed re-tries during synchronization phase

record_types.name: CSR_Register
DIR_Register
FMT0_DR_Register
IFCR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_1
fields.description: Write-only. Clears the Parity error flag

fields.name: PERRCF
fields.description: Write-only. Clears the Overrun error flag

fields.name: OVRCF
fields.description: Write-only. Clears the Synchronization Block Detected flag

fields.name: SBDCF
fields.description: Write-only. Clears the Synchronization Done flag

record_types.name: IMR_Register
SPDIFRX_Peripheral
SR_Register

fields.name: RXNE
fields.description: Read-only. Control Buffer register is not empty

fields.name: Reserved_9_15
fields.description: Read-only. Duration of 5 symbols counted with SPDIF_CLK

variables.name: SPDIFRX_Periph
variables.code:
SPDIFRX_Periph : aliased SPDIFRX_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => SPDIFRX_Base;
